documentation.value: Converts a value to its string representation. For numbers, uses the default number format. For booleans, converts to "true" or "false".
Converts a string to a number. The string must be in a valid number format.
Converts a string to a date value using the configured date format.
Returns the number of elements in a sequence or the number of characters in a string.
Returns true if the variable exists and is not empty. For strings, checks that it's not blank; for sequences, checks length > 0.
Replaces all occurrences of a substring within the string.
The string to replace matches with.
Splits a string into a sequence of substrings around the given separator.
The delimiter string to split on.
Joins the elements of a sequence into a single string, separated by the given delimiter.
The delimiter to place between elements.
Converts all characters in the string to upper case.
Converts all characters in the string to lower case.
